lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸਾਜਨ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਸੰਦੇਸਰਾ ਅਖੀ ਤਾਰ ਲਗੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: sun saajan prem sandesaraa akhee taar lagan |
lines.english: Listen, O my Friend, to my message of love; my eyes are fixed upon You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਜੀਅ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੂ ਸਭਸ ਦਾ ਤੂ ਸਭ ਛਡਾਹੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabh jeea tere too sabhas daa too sabh chhaddaahee |4|
lines.english: All beings are Yours; You belong to all. You deliver all. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਤੁਠੈ ਸਜਣੁ ਮੇਲਿਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਵੰਨਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur tutthai sajan meliaa jan naanak sukh savan |1|
lines.english: The Guru was pleased - He united servant Nanak with his friend, and now he sleeps in peace. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਦਇਆ ਸਦਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur daataa deaal hai jis no deaa sadaa hoe |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Merciful Giver; He is always compassionate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅੰਦਰਹੁ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਹੈ ਸਭੁ ਦੇਖੈ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਇਕੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur andarahu niravair hai sabh dekhai braham ik soe |
lines.english: The True Guru has no hatred within Him; He beholds the One God everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਭਨਾ ਦਾ ਭਲਾ ਮਨਾਇਦਾ ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਬੁਰਾ ਕਿਉ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sabhanaa daa bhalaa manaaeidaa tis daa buraa kiau hoe |
lines.english: The True Guru wishes everyone well; how can anything bad happen to Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਵੈਰਾ ਨਾਲਿ ਜਿ ਵੈਰੁ ਚਲਾਇਦੇ ਤਿਨ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਤਿਸਟਿਆ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: niravairaa naal ji vair chalaaeide tin vichahu tisattiaa na koe |
lines.english: Anyone who directs hate against the One who has no hate, shall never be satisfied within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨੋ ਜੇਹਾ ਕੋ ਇਛਦਾ ਤੇਹਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur no jehaa ko ichhadaa tehaa fal paae koe |
lines.english: As one feels towards the True Guru, so are the rewards he receives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਜਿਦੂ ਕਿਛੁ ਗੁਝਾ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak karataa sabh kichh jaanadaa jidoo kichh gujhaa na hoe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Creator knows everything; nothing can be hidden from Him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਵਡਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੋਈ ਵਡ ਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis no saahib vaddaa kare soee vadd jaanee |
lines.english: One who has been made great by his Lord and Master - know him to be great!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਓਸ ਦੀ ਰੀਸ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਮੂੜ ਅਜਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: je ko os dee rees kare so moorr ajaanee |
lines.english: One who tries to compete with Him is a senseless fool.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਸੋ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis saahib bhaavai tis bakhas le so saahib man bhaanee |
lines.english: By His Pleasure, the Lord and Master forgives those who are pleasing to His Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲੇ ਸੁ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਗੁਣ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis no satigur mele su gun ravai gun aakh vakhaanee |
lines.english: One who is united with the Lord by the True Guru, sings His Praises and speaks His Glories.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਬੁਝਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak sachaa sach hai bujh sach samaanee |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, the True Lord is True; one who understands Him is absorbed in Truth. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਜਪਿਆ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਇਕ ਚਿਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਲਥਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਭਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin japiaa ik man ik chit tin lathaa haumai bhaar |
lines.english: Those who chant and meditate on Him, who single-mindedly focus their consciousness on Him, are rid of the burden of their ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਤਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਅਮਰੁ ਹੈ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har sat niranjan amar hai nirbhau niravair nirankaar |
lines.english: The Lord is true, immaculate and eternal; He has no fear, hatred or form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਕੀ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਫਿਟੁ ਫਿਟੁ ਕਹੈ ਸਭੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koee nindaa kare poore satiguroo kee tis no fitt fitt kahai sabh sansaar |
lines.english: If someone slanders the Perfect True Guru, he will be rebuked and reproached by the whole world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਜੈਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin guramukh har aaraadhiaa tin sant janaa jaikaar |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who worship and adore the Lord - hail to those Saintly beings!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਰਖਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vich aap varatadaa har aape rakhanahaar |
lines.english: The Lord Himself abides within the True Guru; He Himself is His Protector.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਵਾਰਿਆ ਜਿਨ ਜਪਿਆ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak tin kau vaariaa jin japiaa sirajanahaar |1|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is a sacrifice to those who have meditated on the Creator Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਦਾ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan guroo gun gaavadaa tis no sadaa sadaa namasakaar |
lines.english: Blessed, Blessed is the Guru, who sings the Glories of God. Unto Him, I bow forever and ever in deepest reverence.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਿ ਆਪੇ ਜੰਤ ਉਪਾਇਅਨੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਗਿਰਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: vich aape jant upaaeian mukh aape dee giraas |
lines.english: He Himself created the beings there, and He Himself places food in their mouths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਧਰਤੀ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਕਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape dharatee saajeean aape aakaas |
lines.english: He Himself made the earth; He Himself made the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aape aap varatadaa aape hee gunataas |
lines.english: He Himself is All-pervading; He Himself is the Treasure of Excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਸਭਿ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਕਟੇ ਤਾਸੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naam dhiaae too sabh kilavikh katte taas |2|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; He shall take away all your sinful mistakes. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੇ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: too sachaa saahib sach hai sach sache bhaavai |
lines.english: You, O True Lord and Master, are True; the Truth is pleasing to the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹਦੇ ਤਿਨ ਜਮ ਕੰਕਰੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh sach salaahade tin jam kankar nerr na aavai |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not even approach those who praise You, O True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ਪਿਛਾਹਾ ਸਟੀਅਨਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕਪਟੁ ਮਹਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: koorriaar pichhaahaa satteean koorr hiradai kapatt mahaa dukh paavai |
lines.english: The false ones are left behind; because of the falsehood and deceit in their hearts, they suffer in terrible pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਮੁਖ ਦਰਿ ਉਜਲੇ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਚਾ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: tin ke mukh dar ujale jin har hiradai sachaa bhaavai |
lines.english: Their faces are radiant in the Court of the Lord; the Lord is pleasing to their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹ ਕਾਲੇ ਕੂੜਿਆਰੀਆ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ਕੂੜੋ ਹੋਇ ਜਾਵੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: muh kaale koorriaareea koorriaar koorro hoe jaavai |6|
lines.english: Black are the faces of the false; the false remain just false. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਿਖੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਬੀਜਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਫਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gurasikhee amrit beejiaa tin amrit fal har paae |
lines.english: The GurSikhs plant ambrosial nectar, and obtain the Lord as their ambrosial fruit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਧਰਤੀ ਧਰਮ ਹੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੇਹਾ ਕੋ ਬੀਜੇ ਤੇਹਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur dharatee dharam hai tis vich jehaa ko beeje tehaa fal paae |
lines.english: The True Guru is the field of Dharma; as one plants the seeds there, so are the fruits obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਹਲਤਿ ਪਲਤਿ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਓਇ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਸਚੀ ਪੈਨਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: onaa halat palat mukh ujale oe har daragah sachee painaae |
lines.english: Their faces are radiant in this world and the next; in the Court of the Lord, they are robed with honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨੑਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਖੋਟੁ ਨਿਤ ਖੋਟੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਓਹੁ ਜੇਹਾ ਬੀਜੇ ਤੇਹਾ ਫਲੁ ਖਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa andar khott nit khott kamaaveh ohu jehaa beeje tehaa fal khaae |
lines.english: Some have cruelty in their hearts - they constantly act in cruelty; as they plant, so are the fruits which they eat.
